- After the entry gate passes, load and follow `references/planning-rules.md` as the canonical detailed finalization gate.
- When blocked, respond in the compact `blocked` format from `references/output-format.md`: one sentence, a `Missing:` line naming only unconverged dimensions, and up to 3 short clarifying questions.
- Do not use repository exploration, template initialization, or plan writing to settle dimensions that `references/planning-rules.md` still marks unconverged.
- If this fragment and `references/planning-rules.md` appear to differ, the stricter planning rule wins.
